name: L Norvaline
summary: L Norvaline is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on general biological context. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around limited source-backed mechanism signals, not treatment claims.
description: L Norvaline is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on general biological context. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around limited source-backed mechanism signals, not treatment claims.
mechanisms: Proposed arginase inhibition could theoretically increase arginine availability
safetyNotes: Human safety data are insufficient; avoid authority use until controlled human safety evidence exists.
